triage_rows.detail: The local veto scan itself does not change the current wider reference unless the precision is convincingly narrow.
Any local veto remains supervision-only until separately audited inside the phase-2 simulator.

interpretation: V1.34AL turns the local rebound-cost veto scan into the next supervision judgment.
Only a very clean, very narrow veto is allowed to move on to the next experiment; otherwise the clue remains supervision-only.
